          legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 0.8)) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = unwuni_label_healthy, 
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 4)

print(p_unwuni_healthy)

ggsave("03_R/00_outputs/01_plots/p_unwuni_healthy.svg", p_unwuni_healthy, width = 6.5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

6.2 Infants amb MPI

6.2.1 Bray-Curtis

# Fixació de la llavor (reproducibilitat de les permutacions)
set.seed(123)

# Recodificació de la variable període d'estudi per als gràfics
alpha_IPD_metadata$study_period <- relevel(alpha_IPD_metadata$study_period, ref = "postpandemic")

# Càrrega de la matriu de distàncies i de la PCoA
bc_matrix_IPD <- read_qza("02_qiime2/10_diversity/IPD_core-metrics/bray_curtis_distance_matrix.qza")$data
bc_pcoa_IPD <- read_qza("02_qiime2/10_diversity/IPD_core-metrics/bray_curtis_pcoa_results.qza")$data

# Filtratge de les mostres amb valors mancants en les covariables
bc_metadata_clean_IPD <- alpha_IPD_metadata %>%
  drop_na(age, gender, res_mvr)
bc_matrix_clean_IPD <- as.matrix(bc_matrix_IPD)[bc_metadata_clean_IPD$`sample-id`, bc_metadata_clean_IPD$`sample-id`] %>%
    as.dist()

# PERMANOVA no ajustada
permanova_bc_IPD <- adonis2(bc_matrix_IPD ~ study_period, data = alpha_IPD_metadata, permutations = 999)
print(paste("p =", round(permanova_bc_IPD$`Pr(>F)`[1], 3),
            "R2 =", round(permanova_bc_IPD$R2[1], 3)))
## [1] "p = 0.482 R2 = 0.022"
# PERMANOVA ajustada
permanova_bc_model_IPD <- adonis2(bc_matrix_clean_IPD ~ study_period + age + gender + res_mvr, data = bc_metadata_clean_IPD, permutations = 999, by = "margin")
print(data.frame(p  = round(permanova_bc_model_IPD$`Pr(>F)`, 3),
                 R2 = round(permanova_bc_model_IPD$R2, 3),
                 row.names = rownames(permanova_bc_model_IPD)))
##                  p    R2
## study_period 0.723 0.016
## age          0.165 0.033
## gender       0.873 0.013
## res_mvr      0.129 0.035
## Residual        NA 0.900
## Total           NA 1.000
# Homogeneïtat de les dispersions (PERMDISP)
disp_bc_IPD <- permutest(betadisper(bc_matrix_IPD, alpha_IPD_metadata$study_period), permutations = 999)
round(disp_bc_IPD$tab["Groups", "Pr(>F)"], 3)
## [1] 0.586
# Etiqueta amb el valor p i la R2
bc_label_IPD <- paste0(format_p(permanova_bc_IPD$`Pr(>F)`[1]), "\n",       format_r2(permanova_bc_IPD$R2[1]))

# Gràfic
p_bc_IPD <- bc_pcoa_IPD$Vectors %>%
    filter(SampleID %in% alpha_IPD_metadata$`sample-id`) %>%
    left_join(alpha_IPD_metadata, by = c("SampleID" = "sample-id")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = study_period, fill = study_period)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#bdbdbd") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#bdbdbd") +
    geom_point(size = 2.5) +
    xlab(paste0("PC1: ", round(100 * bc_pcoa_IPD$ProportionExplained[1], 2), "%")) +
    ylab(paste0("PC2: ", round(100 * bc_pcoa_IPD$ProportionExplained[2], 2), "%")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("prepandemic" = "#1F77B4", "postpandemic" = "#FF7F0E"),
                       labels = c("prepandemic" = "Prepandèmic", "postpandemic" = "Postpandèmic"),
                       name = "Període d'estudi") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("prepandemic" = "#1F77B4", "postpandemic" = "#FF7F0E"), 
                      guide = "none") +
    stat_ellipse(geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.1, aes(fill = study_period)) +
    theme_bw() + 
    ggtitle("PCoA (Bray-Curtis)") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 0.8)) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = bc_label_IPD, 
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 4)

print(p_bc_IPD)

ggsave("03_R/00_outputs/01_plots/p_bc_IPD.svg", p_bc_IPD, width = 6.5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

6.2.2 Jaccard

# Fixació de la llavor (reproducibilitat de les permutacions)
set.seed(123)

# Càrrega de la matriu de distàncies i de la PCoA
jacc_matrix_IPD <- read_qza("02_qiime2/10_diversity/IPD_core-metrics/jaccard_distance_matrix.qza")$data
jacc_pcoa_IPD <- read_qza("02_qiime2/10_diversity/IPD_core-metrics/jaccard_pcoa_results.qza")$data

# Filtratge de les mostres amb valors mancants en les covariables
jacc_metadata_clean_IPD <- alpha_IPD_metadata %>%
  drop_na(age, gender, res_mvr)
jacc_matrix_clean_IPD <- as.matrix(jacc_matrix_IPD)[jacc_metadata_clean_IPD$`sample-id`, jacc_metadata_clean_IPD$`sample-id`] %>%
    as.dist()

# PERMANOVA no ajustada
permanova_jacc_IPD <- adonis2(jacc_matrix_IPD ~ study_period, data = alpha_IPD_metadata, permutations = 999)
print(paste("p =", round(permanova_jacc_IPD$`Pr(>F)`[1], 3),
            "R2 =", round(permanova_jacc_IPD$R2[1], 3)))
## [1] "p = 0.003 R2 = 0.046"
# PERMANOVA ajustada
permanova_jacc_model_IPD <- adonis2(jacc_matrix_clean_IPD ~ study_period + age + gender + res_mvr, data = jacc_metadata_clean_IPD, permutations = 999, by = "margin")
print(data.frame(p  = round(permanova_jacc_model_IPD$`Pr(>F)`, 3),
                 R2 = round(permanova_jacc_model_IPD$R2, 3),
                 row.names = rownames(permanova_jacc_model_IPD)))
##                  p    R2
## study_period 0.004 0.039
## age          0.247 0.024
## gender       0.998 0.017
## res_mvr      0.027 0.030
## Residual        NA 0.882
## Total           NA 1.000
# Homogeneïtat de les dispersions (PERMDISP)
disp_jacc_IPD <- permutest(betadisper(jacc_matrix_IPD, alpha_IPD_metadata$study_period), permutations = 999)
round(disp_jacc_IPD$tab["Groups", "Pr(>F)"], 3)
## [1] 0.463
# Etiqueta amb el valor p i la R2
jacc_label_IPD <- paste0(format_p(permanova_jacc_IPD$`Pr(>F)`[1]), "\n",       format_r2(permanova_jacc_IPD$R2[1]))

# Gràfic
p_jacc_IPD <- jacc_pcoa_IPD$Vectors %>%
    filter(SampleID %in% alpha_IPD_metadata$`sample-id`) %>%
    left_join(alpha_IPD_metadata, by = c("SampleID" = "sample-id")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = study_period, fill = study_period)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#bdbdbd") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#bdbdbd") +
    geom_point(size = 2.5) +
    xlab(paste0("PC1: ", round(100 * jacc_pcoa_IPD$ProportionExplained[1], 2), "%")) +
    ylab(paste0("PC2: ", round(100 * jacc_pcoa_IPD$ProportionExplained[2], 2), "%")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("prepandemic" = "#1F77B4", "postpandemic" = "#FF7F0E"),
                       labels = c("prepandemic" = "Prepandèmic", "postpandemic" = "Postpandèmic"),
                       name = "Període d'estudi") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("prepandemic" = "#1F77B4", "postpandemic" = "#FF7F0E"), 
                      guide = "none") +
    stat_ellipse(geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.1, aes(fill = study_period)) +
    theme_bw() + 
    ggtitle("PCoA (Jaccard)") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 0.8)) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = jacc_label_IPD, 
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 4)

print(p_jacc_IPD)

ggsave("03_R/00_outputs/01_plots/p_jacc_IPD.svg", p_jacc_IPD, width = 6.5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

6.2.3 Weighted UniFrac

# Fixació de la llavor (reproducibilitat de les permutacions)
set.seed(123)

# Càrrega de la matriu de distàncies i de la PCoA
wuni_matrix_IPD <- read_qza("02_qiime2/10_diversity/IPD_core-metrics/weighted_unifrac_distance_matrix.qza")$data
wuni_pcoa_IPD <- read_qza("02_qiime2/10_diversity/IPD_core-metrics/weighted_unifrac_pcoa_results.qza")$data

# Filtratge de les mostres amb valors mancants en les covariables
wuni_metadata_clean_IPD <- alpha_IPD_metadata %>%
  drop_na(age, gender, res_mvr)
wuni_matrix_clean_IPD <- as.matrix(wuni_matrix_IPD)[wuni_metadata_clean_IPD$`sample-id`, wuni_metadata_clean_IPD$`sample-id`] %>%
    as.dist()

# PERMANOVA no ajustada
permanova_wuni_IPD <- adonis2(wuni_matrix_IPD ~ study_period, data = alpha_IPD_metadata, permutations = 999)
print(paste("p =", round(permanova_wuni_IPD$`Pr(>F)`[1], 3),
            "R2 =", round(permanova_wuni_IPD$R2[1], 3)))
## [1] "p = 0.105 R2 = 0.043"
# PERMANOVA ajustada
permanova_wuni_model_IPD <- adonis2(wuni_matrix_clean_IPD ~ study_period + age + gender + res_mvr, data = wuni_metadata_clean_IPD, permutations = 999, by = "margin")
print(data.frame(p  = round(permanova_wuni_model_IPD$`Pr(>F)`, 3),
                 R2 = round(permanova_wuni_model_IPD$R2, 3),
                 row.names = rownames(permanova_wuni_model_IPD)))
##                  p    R2
## study_period 0.341 0.024
## age          0.062 0.054
## gender       0.994 0.001
## res_mvr      0.372 0.021
## Residual        NA 0.877
## Total           NA 1.000
# Homogeneïtat de les dispersions (PERMDISP)
disp_wuni_IPD <- permutest(betadisper(wuni_matrix_IPD, alpha_IPD_metadata$study_period), permutations = 999)
round(disp_wuni_IPD$tab["Groups", "Pr(>F)"], 3)
## [1] 0.535
# Etiqueta amb el valor p i la R2
wuni_label_IPD <- paste0(format_p(permanova_wuni_IPD$`Pr(>F)`[1]), "\n",       format_r2(permanova_wuni_IPD$R2[1]))

# Gràfic
p_wuni_IPD <- wuni_pcoa_IPD$Vectors %>%
    filter(SampleID %in% alpha_IPD_metadata$`sample-id`) %>%
    left_join(alpha_IPD_metadata, by = c("SampleID" = "sample-id")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = study_period, fill = study_period)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#bdbdbd") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#bdbdbd") +
    geom_point(size = 2.5) +
    xlab(paste0("PC1: ", round(100 * wuni_pcoa_IPD$ProportionExplained[1], 2), "%")) +
    ylab(paste0("PC2: ", round(100 * wuni_pcoa_IPD$ProportionExplained[2], 2), "%")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("prepandemic" = "#1F77B4", "postpandemic" = "#FF7F0E"),
                       labels = c("prepandemic" = "Prepandèmic", "postpandemic" = "Postpandèmic"),
                       name = "Període d'estudi") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("prepandemic" = "#1F77B4", "postpandemic" = "#FF7F0E"), 
                      guide = "none") +
    stat_ellipse(geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.1, aes(fill = study_period)) +
    theme_bw() + 
    ggtitle("PCoA (weighted UniFrac)") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 0.8)) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = wuni_label_IPD, 
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 4)

print(p_wuni_IPD)

ggsave("03_R/00_outputs/01_plots/p_wuni_IPD.svg", p_wuni_IPD, width = 6.5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

6.2.4 Unweighted UniFrac

# Fixació de la llavor (reproducibilitat de les permutacions)
set.seed(123)

# Càrrega de la matriu de distàncies i de la PCoA
unwuni_matrix_IPD <- read_qza("02_qiime2/10_diversity/IPD_core-metrics/unweighted_unifrac_distance_matrix.qza")$data
unwuni_pcoa_IPD <- read_qza("02_qiime2/10_diversity/IPD_core-metrics/unweighted_unifrac_pcoa_results.qza")$data

# Filtratge de les mostres amb valors mancants en les covariables
unwuni_metadata_clean_IPD <- alpha_IPD_metadata %>%
  drop_na(age, gender, res_mvr)
unwuni_matrix_clean_IPD <- as.matrix(unwuni_matrix_IPD)[unwuni_metadata_clean_IPD$`sample-id`, unwuni_metadata_clean_IPD$`sample-id`] %>%
    as.dist()

# PERMANOVA no ajustada
permanova_unwuni_IPD <- adonis2(unwuni_matrix_IPD ~ study_period, data = alpha_IPD_metadata, permutations = 999)
print(paste("p =", round(permanova_unwuni_IPD$`Pr(>F)`[1], 3),
            "R2 =", round(permanova_unwuni_IPD$R2[1], 3)))
## [1] "p = 0.001 R2 = 0.094"
# PERMANOVA ajustada
permanova_unwuni_model_IPD <- adonis2(unwuni_matrix_clean_IPD ~ study_period + age + gender + res_mvr, data = unwuni_metadata_clean_IPD, permutations = 999, by = "margin")
print(data.frame(p  = round(permanova_unwuni_model_IPD$`Pr(>F)`, 3),
                 R2 = round(permanova_unwuni_model_IPD$R2, 3),
                 row.names = rownames(permanova_unwuni_model_IPD)))
##                  p    R2
## study_period 0.012 0.065
## age          0.358 0.022
## gender       0.885 0.013
## res_mvr      0.120 0.032
## Residual        NA 0.833
## Total           NA 1.000
# Homogeneïtat de les dispersions (PERMDISP)
disp_unwuni_IPD <- permutest(betadisper(unwuni_matrix_IPD, alpha_IPD_metadata$study_period), permutations = 999)
round(disp_unwuni_IPD$tab["Groups", "Pr(>F)"], 3)
## [1] 0.126
# Etiqueta amb el valor p i la R2
unwuni_label_IPD <- paste0(format_p(permanova_unwuni_IPD$`Pr(>F)`[1]), "\n",       format_r2(permanova_unwuni_IPD$R2[1]))

# Gràfic
p_unwuni_IPD <- unwuni_pcoa_IPD$Vectors %>%
    filter(SampleID %in% alpha_IPD_metadata$`sample-id`) %>%
    left_join(alpha_IPD_metadata, by = c("SampleID" = "sample-id")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = study_period, fill = study_period)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#bdbdbd") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#bdbdbd") +
    geom_point(size = 2.5) +
    xlab(paste0("PC1: ", round(100 * unwuni_pcoa_IPD$ProportionExplained[1], 2), "%")) +
    ylab(paste0("PC2: ", round(100 * unwuni_pcoa_IPD$ProportionExplained[2], 2), "%")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("prepandemic" = "#1F77B4", "postpandemic" = "#FF7F0E"),
                       labels = c("prepandemic" = "Prepandèmic", "postpandemic" = "Postpandèmic"),
                       name = "Període d'estudi") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("prepandemic" = "#1F77B4", "postpandemic" = "#FF7F0E"), 
                      guide = "none") +
    stat_ellipse(geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.1, aes(fill = study_period)) +
    theme_bw() + 
    ggtitle("PCoA (unweighted UniFrac)") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 0.8)) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = unwuni_label_IPD, 
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 4)

print(p_unwuni_IPD)

ggsave("03_R/00_outputs/01_plots/p_unwuni_IPD.svg", p_unwuni_IPD, width = 6.5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

7 Abundància diferencial

7.1 Infants sans

# Fixació de la llavor
set.seed(123)

# Càrrega de la taula d'ASV i exclusió de la mostra B186
table_healthy_matrix <- as.matrix(read_qza("02_qiime2/08_split_samples/healthy_table.qza")$data)
table_healthy_matrix <- table_healthy_matrix[, colnames(table_healthy_matrix) != "B186"]

# Preparació i alineació de la metadata (nivell de referència: prepandèmic)
healthy <- as.data.frame(healthy)
rownames(healthy) <- healthy$`#SampleID`
healthy <- healthy[colnames(table_healthy_matrix), ]
healthy$study_period <- relevel(healthy$study_period, ref = "prepandemic")

# Ajust del model ANCOM-BC2 (a nivell d'ASV)
ancombc2_multi_asv_healthy <- ancombc2(data = table_healthy_matrix,
                                       meta_data = healthy,
                                       fix_formula = "study_period + age + gender + res_mvr",
                                       p_adj_method = "holm",
                                       pseudo_sens = TRUE,
                                       prv_cut = 0.10,
                                       group = "study_period",
                                       struc_zero = TRUE,
                                       neg_lb = TRUE,
                                       alpha = 0.05,
                                       n_cl = 4)

# Selecció dels tàxons amb abundància diferencial significativa
ancombc2_multi_asv_healthy_res <- ancombc2_multi_asv_healthy$res %>%
  filter(diff_study_periodpostpandemic == TRUE) %>%
  arrange(q_study_periodpostpandemic) %>%
  select(taxon, 
  lfc_study_periodpostpandemic,
  se_study_periodpostpandemic,
  p_study_periodpostpandemic, 
  q_study_periodpostpandemic,
  passed_ss_study_periodpostpandemic)

# Gràfic
p_da_asv_healthy <- ancombc2_multi_asv_healthy_res %>%
   mutate(taxon = recode(taxon, "69fe333f25e6046a874555d0730231c6" = "ASV1671; *Haemophilus_D_734546*",
                                 "09403870435de24e0d1079059a287957" = "ASV544; *Micrococcus luteus*",
                                 "52481542737754786cd8ae22689b7594" = "ASV1209; *Haemophilus_D_734546*",
                                 "a4cd6152db4ba6371bd3d35fcda62a19" = "ASV115; *Streptococcus thermophilus*",
                                 "add7f5d621120b854b4f1ab2f611089e" = "ASV1747; *Prevotella melaninogenica*",
                                 "c33d6f34729b4388992daba22ff22edc" = "ASV1152; *Streptococcus*",
                                 "571d1a0b0be4207e7f8c8f772047a11f" = "ASV1452; *Nanosynbacter*",
                                 "b7942f4f3c2bb7b85f974d89ba64d59c" = "ASV980; *Capnocytophaga sputigena*",
                                 "adaee256a34ff7012e77d1a26d82b874" = "ASV1090; *Rothia dentocariosa*",
                                 "c52b8b3f55d39f44d9ad7c39d15e9db3" = "ASV951; Família Neisseriaceae",
                                 "a67cb3fb1b18821c9ac0f05bd0ba26b1" = "ASV1078; *Porphyromonas_A pasteri*",
                                 "62611dedc42201591d0c89973f903dde" = "ASV1784; *Staphylococcus hominis*",
                                 "d59eb92ad1cea014dba32c409a075aff" = "ASV743; *Veillonella_A rogosae*",
                                 "0a018c977acabf99cf7be6c718ff4c66" = "ASV1242; Família Pasteurellaceae",
                                 "5497318e515a8c328a68f95975d9c7d4" = "ASV1618; *Staphylococcus*",
                                 "e1ee0a34cdeed1b35c0d76410a513439" = "ASV325: *Rothia aeria*",
                                 "0a1f5ed70dcb37a86924dbd5fde981af" = "ASV1168; *Moraxella_A*"),
           direccio = ifelse(lfc_study_periodpostpandemic > 0, "Postpandèmia", "Prepandèmia"),
           robust = ifelse(passed_ss_study_periodpostpandemic, "*", ""),
           taxon = fct_reorder(taxon, lfc_study_periodpostpandemic)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic, y = taxon, fill = direccio)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic - se_study_periodpostpandemic,
                    xmax = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic + se_study_periodpostpandemic),
                width = 0.3, color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = robust,
                x = ifelse(lfc_study_periodpostpandemic > 0,
                           lfc_study_periodpostpandemic + se_study_periodpostpandemic + 0.3,
                           lfc_study_periodpostpandemic - se_study_periodpostpandemic - 0.3)),
            size = 6, vjust = 0.75) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-6, 4, by = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Postpandèmia" = "#7B2CBF", "Prepandèmia" = "#2CA02C"),
                    name = "Període d'estudi") +
  labs(x = "Log fold change", y = NULL, title = "Abundància diferencial d'ASVs en infants sans") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_markdown(),
        panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 0.8, fill = NA))

print(p_da_asv_healthy)

ggsave("03_R/00_outputs/01_plots/p_da_asv_healthy.svg", p_da_asv_healthy, width = 10, height = 4, dpi = 300)

# Ajust del model ANCOM-BC2 (a nivell de gènere)
table_l6_healthy_matrix <- as.matrix(table_l6_healthy)
ancombc2_multi_genus_healthy <- ancombc2(data = table_l6_healthy_matrix,
                                         meta_data = healthy,
                                         fix_formula = "study_period + age + gender + res_mvr",
                                         p_adj_method = "holm",
                                         pseudo_sens = TRUE,
                                         prv_cut = 0.10,
                                         group = "study_period",
                                         struc_zero = TRUE,
                                         neg_lb = TRUE,
                                         alpha = 0.05,
                                         n_cl = 4)

# Selecció dels tàxons amb abundància diferencial significativa
ancombc2_multi_genus_healthy_res <- ancombc2_multi_genus_healthy$res %>%
  filter(diff_study_periodpostpandemic == TRUE) %>%
  arrange(q_study_periodpostpandemic) %>%
  select(taxon, 
  lfc_study_periodpostpandemic,
  se_study_periodpostpandemic,
  p_study_periodpostpandemic, 
  q_study_periodpostpandemic,
  passed_ss_study_periodpostpandemic)

# Gràfic
p_da_genus_healthy <- ancombc2_multi_genus_healthy_res %>%
    mutate(taxon = recode(taxon, "d__Bacteria;p__Actinomycetota;c__Actinomycetes;o__Actinomycetales;f__Actinomycetaceae;g__Actinomyces" = "*Actinomyces*",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Alphaproteobacteria;o__Rhodobacterales;f__Rhodobacteraceae;g__Paracoccus" = "*Paracoccus*",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Burkholderiales;f__Burkholderiaceae_A_595421;__" = "Família Burkholderiaceae_A_595421",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Pseudomonadales_A_650611;f__Pseudomonadaceae;g__Pseudomonas_E_647464" = "*Pseudomonas_E_647464*",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Enterobacterales_737866;f__Pasteurellaceae;__" = "Família Pasteurellaceae",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Patescibacteria;c__Saccharimonadia;o__Saccharimonadales;f__Nanosynbacteraceae;g__Nanosynbacter" = "*Nanosynbacter*",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Enterobacterales_737866;f__Pasteurellaceae;g__Haemophilus_D_736121" = "*Haemophilus_D_736121*",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Actinomycetota;c__Actinomycetes;o__Actinomycetales;f__Micrococcaceae;g__Micrococcus" = "*Micrococcus*",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Fusobacteriota;c__Fusobacteriia;o__Fusobacteriales;f__Fusobacteriaceae;g__Fusobacterium_C" = "*Fusobacterium_C*",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Burkholderiales;f__Neisseriaceae;g__" = "Família Neisseriaceae"),
           direccio = ifelse(lfc_study_periodpostpandemic > 0, "Postpandèmia", "Prepandèmia"),
           robust = ifelse(passed_ss_study_periodpostpandemic, "*", ""),
           taxon = fct_reorder(taxon, lfc_study_periodpostpandemic)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic, y = taxon, fill = direccio)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic - se_study_periodpostpandemic,
                    xmax = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic + se_study_periodpostpandemic),
                width = 0.3, color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = robust,
                x = ifelse(lfc_study_periodpostpandemic > 0,
                           lfc_study_periodpostpandemic + se_study_periodpostpandemic + 0.3,
                           lfc_study_periodpostpandemic - se_study_periodpostpandemic - 0.3)),
            size = 6, vjust = 0.75) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-3, 3, by = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Postpandèmia" = "#7B2CBF", "Prepandèmia" = "#2CA02C"),
                    name = "Període d'estudi") +
  labs(x = "Log fold change", 
       y = NULL,
       title = "Abundància diferencial de gèneres en infants sans") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_markdown(),
        panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 0.8, fill = NA))

print(p_da_genus_healthy)

ggsave("03_R/00_outputs/01_plots/p_da_genus_healthy.svg", p_da_genus_healthy, width = 10, height = 4, dpi = 300)

7.2 Infants amb MPI

# Fixació de la llavor
set.seed(123)

# Càrrega de la taula d'ASV
table_IPD_matrix <- as.matrix(read_qza("02_qiime2/08_split_samples/IPD_table.qza")$data)

# Preparació i alineació de la metadata (nivell de referència: prepandèmic)
IPD <- as.data.frame(IPD)
rownames(IPD) <- IPD$`#SampleID`
IPD <- IPD[colnames(table_IPD_matrix), ]
IPD$study_period <- relevel(IPD$study_period, ref = "prepandemic")

# Ajust del model ANCOM-BC2 (a nivell d'ASV)
ancombc2_multi_asv_IPD <- ancombc2(data = table_IPD_matrix,
                                   meta_data = IPD,
                                   fix_formula = "study_period + age + gender + res_mvr",
                                   p_adj_method = "holm",
                                   pseudo_sens = TRUE,
                                   prv_cut = 0.10,
                                   group = "study_period",
                                   struc_zero = TRUE,
                                   neg_lb = TRUE,
                                   alpha = 0.05,
                                   n_cl = 4)

# Selecció dels tàxons amb abundància diferencial significativa
ancombc2_multi_asv_IPD_res <- ancombc2_multi_asv_IPD$res %>%
  filter(diff_study_periodpostpandemic == TRUE) %>%
  arrange(q_study_periodpostpandemic) %>%
  select(taxon, 
  lfc_study_periodpostpandemic,
  se_study_periodpostpandemic,
  p_study_periodpostpandemic, 
  q_study_periodpostpandemic,
  passed_ss_study_periodpostpandemic)

# Gràfic
p_da_asv_IPD <- ancombc2_multi_asv_IPD_res %>%
    mutate(taxon = recode(taxon, "18eb929cf9350e0af65cf863c2786858" = "ASV647; *Haemophilus_D_735815*",
                                 "d4e740bc5c2587cbbb188e8e30026611" = "ASV1336; *Corynebacterium tuberculostearicum*",
                                 "409f711b59152d57926cf444c5577087" = "ASV541; *Streptococcus*",
                                 "1efa2e9ca8d9d0128928e26097941fb2" = "ASV1095; *Neisseria_563205*",
                                 "5c7cd4afe047a1fa454b6a815a951c2f" = "ASV96; *Veillonella_A atypica*",
                                 "9d66bd49ae60477c6c2839da1f80f58e" = "ASV660; *Haemophilus_D_734546*"),
           direccio = ifelse(lfc_study_periodpostpandemic > 0, "Postpandèmia", "Prepandèmia"),
           robust = ifelse(passed_ss_study_periodpostpandemic, "*", ""),
           taxon = fct_reorder(taxon, lfc_study_periodpostpandemic)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic, y = taxon, fill = direccio)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic - se_study_periodpostpandemic,
                    xmax = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic + se_study_periodpostpandemic),
                width = 0.3, color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = robust,
                x = ifelse(lfc_study_periodpostpandemic > 0,
                           lfc_study_periodpostpandemic + se_study_periodpostpandemic + 0.3,
                           lfc_study_periodpostpandemic - se_study_periodpostpandemic - 0.3)),
            size = 6, vjust = 0.75) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-6, 4, by = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Postpandèmia" = "#FF7F0E", "Prepandèmia" = "#1F77B4"),
                    name = "Període d'estudi") +
  labs(x = "Log fold change", y = NULL, title = "Abundància diferencial d'ASVs en infants amb MPI") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_markdown(),
        panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 0.8, fill = NA))

print(p_da_asv_IPD)

ggsave("03_R/00_outputs/01_plots/p_da_asv_IPD.svg", p_da_asv_IPD, width = 10, height = 3, dpi = 300)

# Ajust del model ANCOM-BC2 (a nivell de gènere)
table_l6_IPD_matrix <- as.matrix(table_l6_IPD)
ancombc2_multi_genus_IPD <- ancombc2(data = table_l6_IPD_matrix,
                                     meta_data = IPD,
                                     fix_formula = "study_period + age + gender + res_mvr",
                                     p_adj_method = "holm",
                                     pseudo_sens = TRUE,
                                     prv_cut = 0.10,
                                     group = "study_period",
                                     struc_zero = TRUE,
                                     neg_lb = TRUE,
                                     alpha = 0.05,
                                     n_cl = 4)

# Selecció dels tàxons amb abundància diferencial significativa
ancombc2_multi_genus_IPD_res <- ancombc2_multi_genus_IPD$res %>%
  filter(diff_study_periodpostpandemic == TRUE) %>%
  arrange(q_study_periodpostpandemic) %>%
  select(taxon, 
  lfc_study_periodpostpandemic,
  se_study_periodpostpandemic,
  p_study_periodpostpandemic, 
  q_study_periodpostpandemic,
  passed_ss_study_periodpostpandemic)

# Gràfic
p_da_genus_IPD <- ancombc2_multi_genus_IPD_res %>%
    mutate(taxon = recode(taxon, "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Enterobacterales_737866;f__Pasteurellaceae;g__Haemophilus_D_735815" = "*Haemophilus_D_735815*",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Bacteroidota;c__Bacteroidia;o__Flavobacteriales_B_877923;f__Weeksellaceae;__" = "Família Weeksellaceae",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Pseudomonadales_A_660879;f__Moraxellaceae;g__Moraxella_A" = "*Moraxella_A*",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Pseudomonadales_A_650611;f__Pseudomonadaceae;g__Pseudomonas_E_647464" = "*Pseudomonas_E_647464*",
                                 "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Pseudomonadales_A_660879;f__Moraxellaceae;g__Moraxella_C_651731" = "*Moraxella_C_651731*"),
           direccio = ifelse(lfc_study_periodpostpandemic > 0, "Postpandèmia", "Prepandèmia"),
           robust = ifelse(passed_ss_study_periodpostpandemic, "*", ""),
           taxon = fct_reorder(taxon, lfc_study_periodpostpandemic)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic, y = taxon, fill = direccio)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic - se_study_periodpostpandemic,
                    xmax = lfc_study_periodpostpandemic + se_study_periodpostpandemic),
                width = 0.3, color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = robust,
                x = ifelse(lfc_study_periodpostpandemic > 0,
                           lfc_study_periodpostpandemic + se_study_periodpostpandemic + 0.3,
                           lfc_study_periodpostpandemic - se_study_periodpostpandemic - 0.3)),
            size = 6, vjust = 0.75) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-6, 6, by = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Postpandèmia" = "#FF7F0E", "Prepandèmia" = "#1F77B4"),
                    name = "Període d'estudi") +
  labs(x = "Log fold change", 
       y = NULL,
       title = "Abundància diferencial de gèneres en infants amb MPI") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_markdown(),
        panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 0.8, fill = NA))

print(p_da_genus_IPD)

ggsave("03_R/00_outputs/01_plots/p_da_genus_IPD.svg", p_da_genus_IPD, width = 10, height = 3, dpi = 300)
